title: Pearl Trajectories
body:
# Pearl Trajectories 
## ender pearl trajectory visualization 

### Features
- beam after landing the pearl
- trajectory of a pearl 
- ability to change trails/beam colors and opacity in the gui (2.0 version only)
- Option to disable or enable rendering of trails and beams with bind (2.0 version only)
### Why?
- helps you see where the opponent's pearl is flying and where it lands

> ### If you like my work, give it a ❤ it helps

# v2.0
> # The Visual Update
- Smooth color transitions on trails
- Ability to change trails/beam colors and opacity in the NEW GUI (default bind V)
- Option to disable or enable rendering of trails and beams with bind (default bind O)

### Warnings
* banned on **all** tierlists
